unimplemented_or_residual: Second independent verifier implementation (planned Reproducer seat; not in this Designer deliverable)

Real Bitcoin script evaluation / ECDSA-Schnorr / full consensus rules

residual_risks: Single reference verifier only; second implementation not provided
Synthetic PQ and source auth stand-ins are not production cryptography
Bitcoin consensus/reorg security outside bounded header model
Stolen-key crypto control is not legal ownership
Whale/Sybil economics not solved by proportional weights
Genesis operator honesty for charity set publication is social/governance
Quantum cutoff height is a policy input, not derived in-protocol
recommended_breaker_task: Attempt to craft a false Beneficial Genesis claim that the reference verifier accepts, focusing on commitment encoding tricks, cutoff off-by-ones, nullifier domain mix-ups under a divergent parser, and allocation over-issuance under a reimplementation that mishandles floor remainder.
